ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] I'm sorry to hear about your urgent need for access but as a guardian of this realm and its secrets, my duty is firstly to maintain order here at East Watch Gate before granting entry into our royal archive where matters are kept secure from prying eyes.
